title: lilac × media
intro: Lilac × media, also known as the lilac hybrid or lilac intermedia, is a hybrid plant resulting from the crossbreeding of two lilac species, Syringa vulgaris and Syringa amurensis. The lilac × media plant is prized for its fragrant flowers, medicinal properties, and potential health benefits. The plant's flowers and leaves contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. The lilac × media plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
